javadoc_before:
/**
 * Result of faceted search for a certain taxonomy node. This class serves as a
 * bin of different attributes of the result node, such as its {@link #ordinal}
 * as well as {@link #label}. You are not expected to modify those values.
 * 
 * @lucene.experimental
 */
javadoc_after:
/** * Result of faceted search for a certain taxonomy node. This class serves as a * bin of different attributes of the result node, such as its {@link #ordinal} * as well as {@link #label}. You are not expected to modify those values. *

* This class implements {@link Comparable} for easy comparisons of result * nodes, e.g. when sorting or computing top-K nodes. * * @lucene.experimental */
